chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD R.A No. 260 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA-180/2015 2. For katcha peshi. 3. For hearing of CMA-1165/2011 07.12.2016. Mr. Manzoor Ahmed Subhopoto, Advocate for respondent No.2. = On last date of hearing, it is almost a year back i.e. 15.10.2015, the matter was adjourned with a note of caution that if no one appears on behalf of the applicants on the next date of hearing, appropriate order shall be passed. Today, no one has appeared on behalf of the applicants neither there is any intimation on behalf of their Counsel Mr.Mir Shahzad Ahmed Talpur, whose name is also appearing in the cause list. This being a matter falling in the old category has been fixed at 11:00 a.m. in the cause list. Consequently, in view of the above, the present revision application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Shahid
